task_goal:
Add the following recipes into the Broccoli app:
Recipe: Kale and Quinoa Salad
 description: A delicious and healthy choice for any time of the day.
 servings: 8 servings
 preparationTime: 10 mins
 ingredients: to your liking
 directions: Toss chopped kale, cooked quinoa, dried cranberries, sliced almonds, and feta cheese with a lemon vinaigrette. Garnish with fresh herbs for a more vibrant taste.
task_goal_rewrite: Successfully add the 'Kale and Quinoa Salad' recipe with all specified details into the Broccoli app.

checkpoints.description: The recipe title 'Kale and Quinoa Salad' is entered into the appropriate field in the Broccoli app.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing the exact recipe title populated in the title input field of the recipe creation form.

checkpoints.description: The recipe description 'A delicious and healthy choice for any time of the day.' is entered into the appropriate field in the Broccoli app.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing the exact description text populated in the description input field of the recipe creation form.

checkpoints.description: The recipe serving size '8 servings' is entered into the appropriate field in the Broccoli app.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing '8 servings' (or numerical value 8 paired with 'servings' unit) populated in the servings input field of the recipe creation form.

checkpoints.description: The recipe preparation time '10 mins' is entered into the appropriate field in the Broccoli app.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing '10 mins' (or numerical value 10 paired with 'mins'/'minutes' unit) populated in the preparation time input field of the recipe creation form.

checkpoints.description: The ingredient note 'to your liking' is entered into the ingredients field in the Broccoli app.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing 'to your liking' populated in the ingredients input field of the recipe creation form.

checkpoints.description: The full direction text 'Toss chopped kale, cooked quinoa, dried cranberries, sliced almonds, and feta cheese with a lemon vinaigrette. Garnish with fresh herbs for a more vibrant taste.' is entered into the directions field in the Broccoli app.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing the exact direction text populated in the directions input field of the recipe creation form.

checkpoints.description: The completed recipe form is submitted and confirmed as saved in the Broccoli app.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing a confirmation message of successful recipe save, or the recipe appearing in the app's saved recipe list.

success_rule: All 7 required checkpoints are fully satisfied; the 'Kale and Quinoa Salad' recipe with all specified details is successfully saved and accessible in the Broccoli app.
